site.tagline: Billings Radon Experts — Certified Testing & Mitigation, Guaranteed Results

seo.meta_title: Radon Mitigation in Billings, MT | Billings Radon Mitigation
seo.meta_description: Professional radon mitigation in Billings, MT. Licensed & insured. Free estimates. Call (406) 476-7479.

faqs.q: What is the average radon level in Billings, MT?
faqs.a: Montana has elevated radon levels statewide. Yellowstone County tests above the EPA action level of 4 pCi/L in many homes. We recommend testing any home and mitigating at 4 pCi/L or above.

faqs.q: How much does radon mitigation cost in Billings?
faqs.a: Radon mitigation in Billings typically costs $900–$1,600 for a standard sub-slab depressurization system. Cost depends on foundation type and radon concentration. Post-mitigation testing is included.

faqs.q: How long does radon mitigation installation take?
faqs.a: Most installations take 4–6 hours in a single day. Your home is fully usable immediately after. We retest 24–48 hours post-installation to verify results.

faqs.q: Do you serve Laurel, Lockwood, and surrounding areas?
faqs.a: Yes — we serve all of Yellowstone County including Laurel, Lockwood, Shepherd, Park City, Columbus, and can travel to Red Lodge, Hardin, and Roundup.
Yes — we guarantee our systems reduce radon below 4 pCi/L or we return to fix it at no charge. Included follow-up testing confirms results.
